REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER RENE DEL PRADO'S AMENDED PETITION TO RESTORE CO-TRUSTEE AND BENEFICIARY RENE DEL PARDO TO THE FAMILY TRUST AND FOR REMOVAL OF COURT-APPOINTED TRUSTEE FEES FOR TRUST VIOLATION, NEGLECT AND MISMANAGEMENT OF TRUST PROPERTY AND ASSETS, DEMAND FOR FULL ACCOUNTING ON PROCEEDS OF UNLAWFUL PROPERTY SALE AND FOR REVERSAL OF PROPERTY SALE AND DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO TRUSTEES OVERALL MALFEASANCE IS DENIED. THE OPERATIVE PETITION, AS DRAFTED, AND SUPPLEMENTS THERETO APPEAR TO SEEK RELIEF NOT AVAILABLE IN THIS CASE, SPECIFICALLY RELIEF ON INTERNAL MATTERS OF THE TRUST (E.G. ACCOUNTING), WHICH BELONG IN THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT; AND RELIEF REGARDING ACTIONS/INACTIONS OF THE SUPERIOR COURT, WHICH CANNOT BE ADDRESSED BY ANOTHER SUPERIOR COURT DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

parties.name: DEL PRADO, RENE 494 46TH AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121

calendar.matters:
Amended Petition To Restore Co-Trustee And Beneficiary Rene Del Pardo To The Family Trust And For Removal Of Court-Appointed Trustee Fees For Trust Violation, Neglect And Mismanagement Of Trust Property And Assets, Demand For Full Accounting On Proceeds Of Unlawful Property Sale And For Reversal Of Property Sale And Damages Attributable To Trustees Overall Malfeasance
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Rene Del Prado; 415-730-3177; petitioner in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.

Mr. Del Prado contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER RENE DEL PRADO'S AMENDED PETITION TO RESTORE CO-TRUSTEE AND BENEFICIARY RENE DEL PARDO TO THE FAMILY TRUST AND FOR REMOVAL OF COURT-APPOINTED TRUSTEE FEES FOR TRUST VIOLATION, NEGLECT AND MISMANAGEMENT OF TRUST PROPERTY AND ASSETS, DEMAND FOR FULL ACCOUNTING ON PROCEEDS OF UNLAWFUL PROPERTY SALE AND FOR REVERSAL OF PROPERTY SALE AND DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO TRUSTEES OVERALL MALFEASANCE is DENIED. The operative petition, as drafted, and supplements thereto appear to seek relief not available in this case, specifically relief on internal matters of the Trust (e.g. accounting), which belong in the Probate Department; and relief regarding actions/inactions of the Superior Court, which cannot be addressed by another superior court department.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Amended Petition To Restore Co-Trustee And Beneficiary Rene Del Pardo To The Family Trust And For Removal Of Court-Appointed Trustee Fees For Trust Violation, Neglect And Mismanagement Of Trust Property And Assets, Demand For Full Accounting On Proceeds Of Unlawful Property Sale And For Reversal Of Property Sale And Damages Attributable To Trustees Overall Malfeasance
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rene Del Prado, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing his own behalf.
No other appearances.

Discussed. The Plaintiff did not give notice that he would be appearing. The Court states that the motion can not be argued without proper notice.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RENE DEL PRADO Amended Petition To Restore Co-Trustee And Beneficiary Rene Del Pardo To The Family Trust And For Removal Of Court-Appointed Trustee Fees For Trust Violation, Neglect And Mismanagement Of Trust Property And Assets, Demand For Full Accounting On Proceeds Of Unlawful Property Sale And For Reversal Of Property Sale And Damages Attributable To Trustees Overall Malfeasance is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. Moving party failed to provide courtesy copies per SFLR 2.7B. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
